# list-venice-image-models
Description: Lists available image generation models from the Venice API by specifying the image type filter.
Source: project
1. Access the Venice API endpoint designed for listing available models.
2. To filter for image models specifically, append the query parameter `?type=image` to the endpoint URL.
3. Send a GET request to the complete URL.
4. Process the API response to extract and display the names or details of the image models.
